name: Pagero
description: Pagero — Global business network for e-invoicing, e-ordering, and tax compliance as a Peppol access point

seo.title: Pagero — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Pagero: Pagero — Global business network for e-invoicing, e-ordering, and tax compliance as a Peppol access point

when_to_use: Sending Peppol-compliant e-invoices to European government buyers
Automating e-ordering and e-invoicing for global supply chains
Tax-compliant invoice clearance in Italy, France, and Spain

pros: Coverage across B2B, B2G and CTC mandates
Acquired by Thomson Reuters — funded roadmap
review.verdict: Top-tier global e-invoicing network with enterprise chops — now even more TR-flavored post-acquisition.
review.best_for: Multinationals needing Peppol and multi-country e-invoicing tied to big ERP deployments.
review.not_for: Startups or SMBs wanting quick, cheap, self-serve e-invoicing.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
